title: Pastel Bloom Frock
description: An elegant, lightweight frock made from premium organic cotton and featuring intricate hand-embroidered pastel blooms.

title: Champagne Silk Gala Dress
description: A sophisticated party gown crafted from luxurious silk. Features a flowy silhouette with subtle champagne and ivory hues.

title: Baroque Pearl Drop Choker
description: Handcrafted choke necklace featuring natural baroque pearls and elegant gold-plated detailing, perfect for minimal luxury statements.

title: Floral Filigree Shagun Envelope
description: Premium handcrafted gift envelopes with intricate gold foil filigree patterns on luxury ivory paper stock.

title: Whimsical Woodland Envelope
